title: Basic JavaScript Searching Algorithms
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Searching Algorithms. Focus on implementing Linear search correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Searching Algorithms
description: Create a function that uses Linear search and Binary search together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Searching Algorithms Project
description: Build a small application that applies Linear search, Binary search, Depth-first search (DFS) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Searching Algorithms
description: The following code has bugs related to Linear search. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Searching Algorithms
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Linear search and Binary search.
